projects.epcContractor: Acciona, UGL, GE Vernova, Consolidated Power Projects (CPP)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate — specialist HV substation and transmission line equipment FAT and QAQC ongoing.
projects.summary: Development of 330kV and 500kV transmission lines and substations to connect renewable energy projects within the Central-West Orana Renewable Energy Zone. Involves significant HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear for new substations.
projects.statusNote: Key transmission infrastructure packages awarded, construction active on multiple fronts. EnergyCo NSW website update Q1 2025.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 — early works and procurement strategy for HV assets being defined.

projects.statusNote: Project development and environmental assessment active. EnergyCo NSW website update Q2 2025.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2026 — major project approvals underway, EPC tender likely late 2026.
projects.summary: Early planning and development for critical transmission infrastructure and substations to unlock renewable energy potential in the New England Renewable Energy Zone. Involves new HV transformers and switchgear.

projects.epcContractor: Hitachi Energy (HVDC converter stations), Prysmian Group (cables)

projects.summary: Stage 1 of a new 750MW HVDC interconnector, including subsea and underground cables, and converter stations in Tasmania and Victoria. Involves complex HVDC transformers, converter equipment, and extensive switchgear.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage now — ongoing HV equipment inspections for substation components and transmission line assets.

projects.epcContractor: GE (wind turbines), PCL Construction (balance of plant)

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate — specialist FAT/QAQC for substation components and BESS is currently open.

projects.projectName: Western Downs Green Power Hub - BESS

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage now — ongoing FAT and QAQC for balance of plant and substation components.
